name: China Gingko Education Group Company Limited
summary: China Gingko Education Group Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides higher education services on hospitality management in the People's Republic of China. The company operates Yinxing Hospitality Management College of CUIT that offers a range of courses in the management, literature, engineering, education, economics, and arts disciplines. Its college provides 25 bachelor's degree programs and 22 junior college diploma programs to approximately 9,553 students. The company was incorporated in 2018 and is headquartered in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China.
